---
title: "Scout visit in the Cerrado"
description: "First exploratory trip to Chapada dos Veadeiros, Goias, Brasil"
author: "Juan PBT"
date: "2025-05-04"
categories: [event, presentation]
image: "/files/images/Cerrado_March2025.JPG"
#css: /custom.css
#draft: true
---

![](/files/images/Cerrado_March2025.JPG)

I visit the Cerrado for the first time on March 2025 and this helped to narrow the ideas about my PhD. project

<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
